response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but his experience is almost entirely in web, mobile, and backend product development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, React). The role requires SoC and IP modeling, AI accelerator performance analysis, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in his background. Brief exposure to low-latency systems and C/C++ tooling does not offset the absence of computer architecture, deep-learning workload, or silicon-level performance work expected at principal level for this domain.
strengths: Long, consistent engineering career (15+ years) meeting the BS + 8 years experience bar
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby (async I/O, fibers, caching at millions of requests/sec)
Some C/C++ and hardware-adjacent exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI, robotics, embedded, audio DSP thesis)
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator experience whatsoever
No deep neural network training/inference optimization or SIMD/MIMD architecture background
Career trajectory is web/product engineering, not performance architecture or hardware-software co-design

key_factors.factor: Solid general engineering seniority and systems fundamentals
